languages.title: Lulwimi
languages.subtitle: Khetsa lulwimi lolusetjentiswa kulo lonkhe luhlelo lokusebenta.

phone.label: Inombolo yelucingo
phone.searchCountry: Sesha live, ikhodi, noma sicalo sekushayela
phone.invalid: Faka inombolo yelucingo levumelekile yelive lelikhetsiwe.

auth.onboardingTagline: Umngane wekuphepha kwemuntfu ngetikhatsi letisemkhatsini wekutsi “Ngikahle” nekutsi “Ngidzinga lusito.”
auth.createSubtitle: Khetsa indlela yekungena ngemvume kute uvikele igrafu yakho yekuphepha.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Asikwatanga kucedza kungena ngemvume. Hlola kuxhumana kwakho bese uyazama futsi.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Kusebentisa sikhatsi sekutfutfukisa indzawo. Native Google Sign-In isebenta ekwakheni intfutfuko.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair manje noma uchubeke bese uyayifaka kamuva.
auth.northStarBody: I VL01 wearable ingavusa kugeleta kwekuphepha ngetimpompi kanye netimphawu tekucindzetela letindze.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Umngane wakho wekuphepha lomnene ebalazweni nasetingcingo.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ingasita ngendlela yasekhaya, imodi yekugadza, imodi yesimo lesiphutfumako, kushaya lucingo lwesizatfu, kanye nekusekelwa ngelivi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Isetjentiselwa imephu, tindzawo letiyingoti, kufika lokuphephile, kanye nesimo SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving ubuta indzawo kute banakekeli bavisise kutsi lusito lungadzingeka kuphi. Ungashintja loku kamuva ku- Settings.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Tatiso tisekela kungena kanye nemicimbi lephutfumako.
permissions.notificationsBody: Sisebentisa kuphela tatiso tekuphepha, tibuyeketo letiphutfumako, kanye netikhumbuto lotivumako.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isebentisa indzawo yakho yemephu yekuphepha, tindzawo letiyingoti, kwabelana ngekushesha, kanye nesimo SOS. Ungashintja loku kamuva ku- Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving itfumela tikhumbuto tekungena, tibuyeketo letiphutfumako, kanye netikhutsato tekuphepha lotivumako. Asisebentisi tatiso tetikhangiso.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving usebentisa umbhobho wakho kuphela uma ucala AI umngane noma lucingo lwekuphepha.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isebentisa Bluetooth kubhangqa ne NorthStar bucwebe, fundza simo sekuxhumana, kanye nekuvusa kugeleta kwekuphepha kusuka ku-wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving usebentisa ikhamera kuphela uma ukhetsa kutsatsa sitfombe sephrofayela noma kwabelana ngesitfombe sekuphepha.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving igcina loku kugeleta kutfolakala kusuka kuTilungiselelo nakudeshibhodi.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Khetsa livi lelihambisanako lelitiva liphephile kakhulu kuliva.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Kugadza lokuthulile kute kuphephe onkhe malanga.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Timpompi letisihlanu tingakhuphuka tibe ngu SOS kanye netecwayiso temgadzi.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Dala sizatfu lesinemusa sekushiya simo lesingakhululeki.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Cala lucingo lwemngani wesikhatsi sangempela uma udzinga kusekelwa.

jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth kuskena akuzange kucale. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.
jewelry.scanFailed: Asizange sitfole bucwebe lobusedvute. Hlola Bluetooth, gcina NorthStar uvaliwe, bese uyazama futsi.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth kuskena akuzange kucale. Hlola Bluetooth kufinyelela bese uyazama futsi.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Kufinyelela kudivayisi lesedvute kucishiwe. Vumela Bluetooth kufinyelela ku Tilungiselelo, bese uyazama futsi.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar kutsatse sikhatsi lesidze kakhulu kuxhumana. Lisondzete bese uyazama futsi.
jewelry.connectFailed: Asikwatanga kuxhumana na NorthStar. Hlola kutsi ishajiwe futsi iseduze, bese uyazama futsi.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Gcina NorthStar ushajiwe futsi usondzele kulolucingo, bese uyaphindze uskene.

home.subtitle: Ideshibhodi lehambisana nekuphepha
home.readyBody: Livi, imephu, bucwebe, kanye nebagadzi bakhona ngempompi munye.

map.title: Imephu yekuphepha
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go kubuka ngaphambilini; Mapbox iniketa ekwakheni kwentfutfuko.
map.updateFailed: Asikwatanga kubuyeketa indzawo yakho. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.
map.notRequested: Kufinyelela endzaweni akuzange kucelwe. Ungayinika emandla kamuva kusuka ku- Settings.
map.permissionOff: Kufinyelela endzaweni kucishiwe. Nika emandla ku-Settings kute ubeke ekhatsi imephu yekuphepha kuwe.
map.timeout: Indzawo yakho itsatsa sikhatsi lesidze kunalesilindzelekile. Hamba endzaweni lenesibonakaliso lesicacile bese uyazama futsi.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Tindzawo letetsembekile lotigcinako titawuvela lapha kute ukhone kufinyelela ngekushesha.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Cala lucingo nobe uthayiphe umlayeto nasewukulungele.

history.clearMessage: Loku kususa imilayeto AI lehambisanako legciniwe kuledivayisi.
history.title: Umlandvo wengcoco
history.subtitle: AI imilayeto lehambisanako legcinwe kuledivayisi.
history.emptyMessage: Tingcoco takho AI temngani titawuvela lapha ngemuva kwekushaya kwakho kwekucala.
history.loadFailed: Asikwatanga kulayisha umlandvo wengcoco. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.
history.clearFailed: Asikwatanga kususa umlandvo wengcoco. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.
history.deleteFailed: Asikwatanga kuyicisha leyo ngcoco. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.

voices.title: Emavi ami ekubita ngekuphepha
voices.subtitle: Khetsa livi lelihambisanako lelitiva lilungile kuliva.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Lesampula yelivi ayikwazanga kudlalwa. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Sebentisa timphendvulo letihambisanako letihlanganisiwe nangabe inethiwekhi nobe Hume ticinisekiso tingatfolakali.
settings.privacyBody: Tfumela nobe ususe idatha yendzawo legcinwe kuledivayisi.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Loku kususa iphrofayli yakho, emasethingi, bantfu labatsintsana nabo ngesikhatsi lesiphutfumako, umlandvo wengcoco, tikhumbuto temvume, kanye neseshini yekucinisekisa yasendzaweni kuledivayisi.

sections.languageSubtitle: Lulwimi lwesikhombisi kanye nelulwimi lwemvume yeluhlelo
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, banakekeli, kanye nebantfu labatsintsana nabo ngesikhatsi lesiphutfumako
sections.privacySubtitle: Umlandvo, kutfumela ngaphandle, kucisha, kanye nenchubomgomo

settings.updateFailedMessage: Asikwatanga kugcina loko lokukhetsako. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Session yakho isasebenta. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.

contacts.title: Bantfu labatsintsana nabo ngesikhatsi lesiphutfumako
contacts.subtitle: Bantfu labatsembekile labatfolakala ngesikhatsi sekugeleta kwekuphepha.
contacts.addTitle: Ngeta umuntfu lotsintsana naye ngesikhatsi lesiphutfumako
contacts.name: Ligama
contacts.emptyTitle: Kute bantfu labatsintsana nabo ngesikhatsi lesiphutfumako
contacts.emptyMessage: Ngeta umuntfu lometsembako kute akulungele nangabe kugeleta kwekuphepha kumdzinga.
contacts.removeMessage: Lomuntfu angeke asavela ekugelezeni kwakho lokuphutfumako.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Asikwatanga kugcina lokutsintsana. Hlola imininingwane bese uyazama futsi.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Asikwatanga kususa lokutsintsana. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.

friends.title: Bangani
friends.subtitle: Bagadzi, ticelo, kanye negrafu yesimo lesiphutfumako.
friends.emptyMessage: Bangani labatsembekile kanye nebanakekeli batawuvela lapha uma sebangetiwe.

emergency.title: Simo lesiphutfumako SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate kuphela uma udzinga kusekelwa ngekushesha.
emergency.body: Loku kutawutjela kuhamba kwakho kwekuphepha futsi kulungiselele bantfu labatsintsana nabo ngesikhatsi lesiphutfumako.
emergency.addContact: Ngeta umuntfu lotsintsana naye ngesikhatsi lesiphutfumako ku-Settings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Sicumbi sekwabelana ngendzawo sesilungile. Xhuma indzawo yekugcina yekwabelana ngemuva kute utfumele tikhonjiso letibukhoma.

capybearTap.title: Capybear thepha
capybearTap.subtitle: Thepha kabili NorthStar yakho kute ulahle liwolintshi lekuphepha.
capybearTap.body: Gesture umzila ulungele BLE umcimbi wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: Ubonakala awukho ku-inthanethi. Umlayeto wakho utawutfunyelwa nawuphindze uxhumane.
errors.voiceQueued: Umlayeto ugcinwe. Itawutfunyelwa lapho umngane welivi aphindze axhumane.
errors.microphone: Kudzingeka kutsi kube ne-microphone kute ushaye lucingo ngelivi. Ungayinika emandla ku- Settings, nobe uthayiphe umlayeto esikhundleni saloko.
errors.billing: Umngane welivi leku-inthanethi akatfolakali kwesikhashana. Ungachubeka nemngane longasebenti ku-inthanethi.
errors.authentication: Umngane welivi akazange akhone kucinisekisa leseshini. Ngena ngemvume futsi nobe usebentise umngane longasebenti ku-inthanethi kwanyalo.
errors.timeout: Umngane welivi watsatsa sikhatsi lesidze kakhulu kutsi aphendvule. Hlola kuxhumana kwakho bese uyazama futsi.
errors.network: Asikwatanga kufinyelela kumngane welivi. Hlola kuxhumana kwakho, bese uyazama futsi noma uchubeke ungaxhunyi ku-inthanethi.
errors.genericVoice: Kukhona lokuphazamise lucingo lwelivi. Zama futsi, noma uchubeke nemngani longasebenti ku-inthanethi.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving udzinga kufinyelela kumakrofoni kute kuphephe kanye ne AI lucingo loluhambisanako.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving usebentisa indzawo yakho yemephu yekuphepha kanye netimphawu tekuphepha letisedvute.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving isebentisa Bluetooth kuxhumana nebucwebe bakho bekuphepha NorthStar.

releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Imodi yekuhlola isebentisa idatha yemanga yasendzaweni kuphela. Tinsita letichunyiwe atikacinisekiswa, futsi leseshini icala kabusha uma i-app ilayishwa kabusha.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Ikhodi yekucinisekisa ayikalungi noma isiphelelwe sikhatsi. Cela ikhodi lensha bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Imitamo yekungena miningana kakhulu. Linda sikhashana, bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Kucinisekisa kungena kutsatse sikhatsi lesidze kakhulu. Hlola kuchumana kwakho bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Asikhonanga kufinyelela insita yekungena. Hlola kuchumana kwakho bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Iseshini yakho isiphelelwe sikhatsi. Ngena futsi.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Libalave lekuphepha alikhonanga kulayisha. Hlola kuchumana kwakho bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Indzawo lebukhoma ayitfolakali. Kuboniswa indzawo yakho yekugcina leyagcinwa nga-%{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Asikhonanga kwabelana ngendzawo yakho. Hlola imvume yendzawo bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Nayi indzawo yami yekugcina leyagcinwa, yarekhodwa nga-%{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Kufinyelela ku-Bluetooth kuvaliwe. Kuvule ku-Settings, bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth icishiwe. Yivule, bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Kubhanqa nge-Bluetooth akutfolakali kulolucingo noma kuloluhlobo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Asikhonanga kutfola NorthStar. Yigcine isedvute, hlola Bluetooth, bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Kute emadivayisi e-NorthStar lasedvute latfolakele. Yigcine isedvute bese usesha futsi.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Asikhonanga kuchumana ne-NorthStar. Yigcine ishajiwe futsi isedvute, bese uyetama futsi.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Bekute umuntfu wekutfintsana naye esimeni lesiphutfumako; kute lucingo lolushayiwe.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Sidayeli selucingo asikhonanga kuvuleka; kute lucingo lolushayiwe.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Umsiti welivi akatfolakali nyalo. Yetama futsi ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi noma uchubeke nemsiti longasebentisi i-inthanethi.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Hlela umuntfu wekutfintsana naye esimeni lesiphutfumako
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Umuntfu wekutfintsana naye esimeni lesiphutfumako ubuyeketiwe.
